cards.title: Parenting Teenagers Through A-Levels
cards.body: Supporting a teenager doing A-levels can feel helpless and overwhelming for parents. Understanding the curriculum alongside your child requires patience and humility when facing complex subjects.

cards.title: Pet Care Teaches Family Nurturing Skills
cards.body: Raising a pet like a rabbit can be harder work than raising babies, but teaches valuable lessons about nurturing creatures you can't reason with. The experience mirrors parenting challenges in unexpected ways.

cards.title: Keeping Children's Memories of Deceased Parents
cards.body: Reading your deceased spouse's favorite books with your child can help process grief and honor their memory. This shared experience eases parental guilt and reminds you of the emotional world you built together.

cards.title: Promoting Independence Reduces Child Anxiety
cards.body: Anxious children benefit from opportunities to do slightly challenging things without adult supervision. Allowing calculated independence builds confidence and resilience.

cards.title: Stepparenting: Being an Ally Matters
cards.body: Stepchildren feel more supported and connected when stepparents actively demonstrate they're on their side. Being an ally shows stepchildren they genuinely matter in the family structure.

cards.title: Children's Books Support Mental Health
cards.body: Reading together is a powerful tool for supporting children's emotional well-being. A few minutes with a book can make a meaningful difference in a child's mental health.

cards.title: Understanding Abandonment Fears in Children
cards.body: From infancy, children rely on caregivers for survival, making abandonment fears deeply primal. Treatment for abandonment trauma in children requires understanding this fundamental need for security.

cards.title: Childcare Affordability Crisis in Britain
cards.body: Government spending on childcare support risks being undermined by hidden charges from profit-driven providers. Families deserve full access to benefits meant to help them afford raising children.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Child Wellbeing
cards.body: Family estrangement exists on a continuum rather than as a binary state, affecting children and parents differently. Support systems play a crucial role in helping families navigate reduced contact and potential reconciliation.
